summary: Incomplete deliverable. Core Python code is sound (good error handling, type hints, docstrings) but workflow references missing files: tests/, label_config.json, test_fixture.json. Critical omission: task explicitly requires a test harness script to run `act` and validate output, generating act-result.txt—this is entirely absent. Workflow will fail immediately. Action not pinned to SHA (best_practices). Hardcoded mock data in pr_label_assigner.py main() limits flexibility. Glob-to-regex conversion is complex and potentially fragile for future features.
